bullet_hierarchy.text: Content-Based Product Recommendation Using Machine Learning

slides.summary: E-Commerce Recommendation System: FIRST REVIEW; Content-Based Product Recommendation Using Machine Learning; VEERAMACHINENI SHIKHAR· 23BCE9278

slides.title: PROJECT OVERVIEW

elements.text:
Modern e-commerce platforms host thousands of products, making personalized discovery essential for user engagement. This project builds a Content-Based Recommendation System that helps users find products matching their interests and preferences.
The first review phase focuses on designing and implementing Content- Based Filtering (CBF) as the foundation for more advanced recommendation techniques.

bullet_hierarchy.text: Modern e-commerce platforms host thousands of products, making personalized discovery essential for user engagement. This project builds a Content-Based Recommendation System that helps users find products matching their interests and preferences.
The first review phase focuses on designing and implementing Content- Based Filtering (CBF) as the foundation for more advanced recommendation techniques.

slides.title: The Challenge We're Solving

elements.text:
Overwhelming Product Catalogs
Users face decision paralysis when browsing through massive product inventories without personalized guidance.

bullet_hierarchy.text: Users face decision paralysis when browsing through massive product inventories without personalized guidance.

elements.text:
Lack of Personalization
Traditional search systems return generic results that don't consider individual user preferences and shopping history.

bullet_hierarchy.text: Traditional search systems return generic results that don't consider individual user preferences and shopping history.

elements.text:
Reduced Engagement
Generic recommendations fail to capture user interest, leading to lower conversion rates and customer satisfaction.

bullet_hierarchy.text: Generic recommendations fail to capture user interest, leading to lower conversion rates and customer satisfaction.

elements.text: Our Goal: Recommend products based on user interests and product characteristics to create a personalized shopping journey.

bullet_hierarchy.text: Our Goal: Recommend products based on user interests and product characteristics to create a personalized shopping journey.

slides.title: Content-Based Filtering Approach

elements.text: Content-Based Filtering (CBF) recommends products by analyzing their attributes, user interaction history, and calculating similarity between product features.

bullet_hierarchy.text: Content-Based Filtering (CBF) recommends products by analyzing their attributes, user interaction history, and calculating similarity between product features.

elements.text:
Product Attributes
Category, brand, keywords, and description features

bullet_hierarchy.text: Category, brand, keywords, and description features

elements.text:
User History
Past interactions and preference patterns

Feature Similarity
Mathematical comparison of product vectors
Core Principle: Recommend items similar to products previously preferred by the user.
